rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: Brainstacks frozen MoE-LoRA + null-space gradient constraints = multi-mechanism selective-layer preservation; null-space constraint is a direct twin of zero-gradient masking axis
LoRAC-IPC critical-parameter constraints = direct twin of 'SELECT critical layers' selective-preservation premise; constraint = L2-bind axis
EWC-LoRA combines weight-importance regularization (L2-bind to anchor) with low-rank update stack; covers tannin-L2 axis + selective-layer preservation
Subspace-controlled LoRA = same selective-subspace preservation primitive
Gradient-Mask Tuning = direct twin of anaerobic-style zero-gradient masking axis (i)
Hessian layer-wise clipping + gradient annealing = multi-axis layer-selective stability stack; clipping ~ L_inf bind, annealing ~ vanishing LR
Online-LoRA task-free continual = passive selective-parameter preservation primitive

fail_reason: total_hits=7 >> 1. The 4-axis stack is decomposable into already-published continual-learning primitives: (i) zero-gradient masking = Gradient-Mask Tuning 2406.15330 and Brainstacks null-space 2604.01152; (ii) L2/L_inf binding to anchor = EWC-LoRA 2602.17559 and LoRAC-IPC 2504.13407 critical-parameter constraints; (iii) locally-vanishing LR = Hessian layer-wise clipping + gradient annealing 2025.emnlp-main.1323; (iv) selective critical-layer subset = LoRAC-IPC critical-param + Subspace LoRA 2025.acl-long.940 + Online-LoRA WACV 2025. Each axis individually has a direct twin; the 'stack' is a recombination, and multi-mechanism selective preservation in CL is itself densely published. The biological framing (anaerobic/tannin/cold/sphagnan) does not add a novel computational mechanism — purely positional/analogical refinement. Concurs with 10_decision.json FAIL verdict.
